kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=serverest, url=https://serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Deve Cadastrar Um Novo Usuário Com Sucesso

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Hora do QA' into text field 'name=nome'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
